title: T-045 — UI: TEC-089 BOM Change History timeline
prompt: Build the BOM change history audit timeline per §7A. Reads audit_log filtered to bom_* tables for current BOM. Shows actor + reason + delta% summary per change. Match `history_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:230-263. RED tests/ui/tec-089-history.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-089-history.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Audit timeline filtered to BOM changes for one BOM.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use shadcn ScrollArea + Card list. Each entry shows actor, action, reason, and rendered delta summary (qty changed by N%, components added/removed counts).
acceptance_criteria: Given the history page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:230-263, then the timeline structure, entry layout, and primitives match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given audit_log empty, when rendered, then 'No history' empty state appears.
Given filter actor=user1, when applied, then timeline shows only their entries.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + filter behaviour.
risk_red_lines: Do not query audit_log without org RLS.
